scenario_1_vapi_to_ghl.name: AG: VAPI Lead Capture → GHL + Notify
scenario_1_vapi_to_ghl.description: When VAPI completes a call, add lead to GHL, send you notification, backup to Google Sheets

scenario_2_welcome_sequence.name: AG: Welcome Sequence (SMS + Email)
scenario_2_welcome_sequence.description: When new lead enters GHL from VAPI, send welcome SMS and email immediately

modules.name: Send Welcome SMS via GHL
modules.message: Hi {{contact.firstName}}, this is {{your_name}} from AG Automation. Thanks for your time today! Here's your AI audit link: {{calendly_link}} Any questions, just reply. -{{your_name}}

modules.name: Send Welcome Email via GHL
modules.subject: {{contact.customField.business_name}} — Your AI Lead Recovery Video
modules.body_html:
Hi {{contact.firstName}},

Thanks for taking my call today. As promised, here's the 2-minute video showing how Alberta {{contact.customField.trade_type}} businesses recover 40% of lost leads:

▶ Watch the Video

After watching, if you want to see exactly how many leads {{contact.customField.business_name}} is losing, book your free 15-minute AI audit:

📅 Book My Free Audit

During the audit, I'll show you:

  • How many leads you lose per week (exact number)
  • What that's costing you monthly
  • How our system recovers them automatically
  • The exact ROI for your business

No obligation. No pressure. Just numbers.

Questions? Reply to this email or text me at {{your_phone}}.

Best,
{{your_name}}
AG Automation

scenario_3_content_factory.name: AG: Content Factory
scenario_3_content_factory.description: When you upload a Loom video, auto-generate LinkedIn posts, tweets, and blog summary

modules.name: Send to Claude for Content Generation

messages.content: You are a content writer for AG Automation, an AI agency serving Alberta trades businesses. Write in short paragraphs, include specific numbers, use confident tone.
Based on this video about AI for trades businesses, write: 1) A LinkedIn post (150 words), 2) A Twitter thread (3 tweets), 3) A blog excerpt (200 words). Video topic: {{video_topic}}

body.text: ✍️ Content batch ready! Check Google Docs.
